basics.name: Lianghui Yi
basics.label: Forward Deployed Engineer
basics.summary: Entrepreneur and AI engineer with 6+ years building SaaS products, autonomous AI agents, and cloud infrastructure. Grew one venture to $1,000,000 ARR; delivered 50% AWS cost reduction. Specializes in agentic systems, LLM integration (Model Context Protocol), and multi-tenant cloud deployment.

work.name: 24 Helpful, LLC
highlights: Architected a self-evolving code system (generator/evaluator loop) that accelerated development velocity; implemented GitHub Actions CI/CD to close iteration cycles in under 24 hours.
Delivered end-to-end multi-tenant AWS cloud infrastructure for enterprise customers, reducing provisioning costs by 50% through automated resource management and tenant isolation.

Scoped requirements directly with customers, removed deployment blockers, and accelerated rollouts — codified deployment playbooks and runbooks to standardize operational response across production systems.

work.name: 24Haowan Network Technology Co., Ltd.
highlights: Designed SaaS product and go-to-market strategy that achieved $1,000,000 ARR in 2 years through optimized product lifecycle, user onboarding, and data-driven iteration loops.
Led cross-functional engineering team; built internal tools that streamlined product and engineering workflows, improving team delivery cadence over a 6-month period.
Engaged enterprise customers to scope technical requirements and uncover pain points, converting 3 strategic accounts within 3 months and improving product-market fit.

work.name: Maiduote Network Technology Co., Ltd.
highlights: Launched a production doctor-patient engagement platform that increased engagement by 30%; integrated predefined forms and chatbots in collaboration with clinical stakeholders.
Drove growth strategies that acquired 50,000+ users in 6 months, exceeding targets through targeted outreach and full-stack feature delivery.

projects.name: tokenman.io
projects.description: Claude Code Hosting & AI Repo Self-Evolution
highlights: Built terminal.tokenman.io — a multi-tenant Claude Code CLI hosting SaaS on EC2 with mobile-first SSH, persistent tmux sessions, and cloud-init provisioning for secure production access.

Designed a skill-based repo self-evolution system with shared AI context and slash commands, enabling autonomous AI-driven code loops via GitHub Actions (human + AI and headless generator/evaluator workflows).

projects.name: aInbox (ainbox.io)
highlights: Built an MCP-native AI agent middleware platform giving LLMs a dedicated inbox and async messaging layer, operated entirely via Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools with no traditional UI.

Designed full server architecture with OAuth, JWT, and Streamable HTTP transport; implemented LLM-driven triage and labeling pipeline deployed on multi-tenant AWS infrastructure using Aurora Serverless, SES, and per-user IAM roles.

projects.name: AgentFolio
highlights: Built an agentic portfolio engine that detects visitor context and dynamically adapts resume content using LLM-powered rewriting and JD-matching pipelines; deployed on pure GitHub infrastructure with zero third-party cost.

Designed a five-stage agent architecture (perceive → reason → act → learn → explain) with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)-powered chat, automated JD fetching, and visitor feedback loops that continuously optimize content resonance.

skills.name: Cloud & Infrastructure
keywords: AWS (EC2, SES, Aurora Serverless, IAM, SCPs)

education.institution: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications

volunteer.summary: Led community initiatives and organized weekly founder-focused events (1,000+ participants in 1 year), coordinated volunteers and facilitated connections to strengthen engagement and collaboration.
